00024 #include "wrappers.h"
00025 
00026 #include "class.h"
00027 #include "classfile.h"
00028 #include "memory.h"
00029 #include "util.h"
00030 #include "vm.h"
00031 
00032 /******************************************************************************
00033  * Classpath type definitions                                                 *
00034  ******************************************************************************/
00035 
00039 struct path_t {
00040     const char *str; 
00041 #ifdef JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00042     ZZIP_DIR *jar; 
00043 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00044 };
00045 
00047 typedef struct path_t path_t;
00048 
00051 struct classpath_t {
00052     size_t entries; 
00053     path_t boot; 
00054     path_t user[]; 
00055 };
00056 
00058 typedef struct classpath_t classpath_t;
00059 
00060 /******************************************************************************
00061  * Globals                                                                    *
00062  ******************************************************************************/
00063 
00065 static classpath_t *classpath;
00066 
00067 /******************************************************************************
00068  * Local functions prototypes                                                 *
00069  ******************************************************************************/
00070 
00071 static void set_classpath_string(path_t *, const char *);
00072 
00073 /******************************************************************************
00074  * Classpath implementation                                                   *
00075  ******************************************************************************/
00076 
00081 static void set_classpath_string(path_t *path, const char *str)
00082 {
00083 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00084     size_t len = strlen(str);
00085 
00086     if ((len > 4) && (strcmp(str + len - 4, ".jar") == 0)) {
00087         // This is a JAR file
00088         path->jar = zzip_dir_open(str, 0);
00089 
00090         if (path->jar == NULL) {
00091             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
00092                     "Unable to open JAR file: %s", str);
00093         }
00094     }
00095 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00096 
00097     path->str = str;
00098 } // set_classpath_string()
00099 
00102 void classpath_init( void )
00103 {
00104     size_t count = 1;
00105     char *bcp = opts_get_boot_classpath();
00106     char *cp = opts_get_classpath();
00107     char *idx = cp;
00108 
00109     // Count the number of directories/JAR files in the classpath
00110     while (*(idx = cstrchrnul(idx, ':')) != '\0') {
00111         count++;
00112         *idx = '\0';
00113         idx++;
00114     }
00115 
00116     classpath = gc_palloc(sizeof(classpath_t) + sizeof(path_t) * (count + 1));
00117     classpath->entries = count;
00118 
00119     set_classpath_string(&classpath->boot, bcp);
00120     idx = cp;
00121 
00122     for (size_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
00123         idx = cstrchrnul(idx, ':');
00124         set_classpath_string(&classpath->user[i], cp);
00125         idx++;
00126         cp = idx;
00127     }
00128 } // classpath_init()
00129 
00132 void classpath_teardown( void )
00133 {
00134 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00135     for (size_t i = 0; i < classpath->entries; i++) {
00136         if (classpath->user[i].jar != NULL) {
00137             zzip_dir_close(classpath->user[i].jar);
00138         }
00139     }
00140 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00141 } // classpath_teardown()
00142 
00143 /******************************************************************************
00144  * Class file implementation                                                  *
00145  ******************************************************************************/
00146 
00152 static class_file_t *cf_open_with_classpath(const char *name, const path_t *cp)
00153 {
00154 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00155     ZZIP_FILE *zzip_file;
00156 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00157     FILE *file = NULL;
00158     class_file_t *cf;
00159     char *path;
00160     size_t cp_len;
00161     size_t cl_len = strlen(name);
00162 
00163 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00164     if (cp->jar != NULL) {
00165         // Append the .class suffic to the class name
00166         path = gc_malloc(cl_len + strlen(".class") + 1);
00167 
00168         strncpy(path, name, cl_len + 1);
00169         strncat(path, ".class", cl_len + strlen(".class") + 1);
00170         zzip_file = zzip_file_open(cp->jar, path, 0);
00171 
00172         if (zzip_file == NULL) {
00173             return NULL;
00174         }
00175 
00176         cf = gc_malloc(sizeof(class_file_t));
00177         cf->file.compressed = zzip_file;
00178         cf->jar = true;
00179     } else {
00180 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00181         /* Append the class name to the classpath and add the .class suffix to
00182          * the resulting string */
00183         cp_len = strlen(cp->str);
00184         path = gc_malloc(cp_len + cl_len + strlen(".class") + 2);
00185         strncpy(path, cp->str, cp_len + 1);
00186         strncat(path, "/", cp_len + 2);
00187         strncat(path, name, cp_len + cl_len + 2);
00188         strncat(path, ".class", cp_len + cl_len + strlen(".class") + 2);
00189 
00190         file = fopen(path, "rb");
00191 
00192         if (file == NULL) {
00193             return NULL;
00194         }
00195 
00196         cf = gc_malloc(sizeof(class_file_t));
00197         cf->file.plain = file;
00198 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00199     }
00200 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00201 
00202     gc_free(path);
00203 
00204     return cf;
00205 } // cf_open_with_classpath()
00206 
00212 class_file_t *cf_open(const char *name)
00213 {
00214     class_file_t *cf = NULL;
00215 
00216     if ((strncmp(name, "java/", 5) == 0)
00217         || (strncmp(name, "javac/", 6) == 0)
00218         || (strncmp(name, "javax/", 6) == 0)
00219         || (strncmp(name, "jelatine/", 9) == 0))
00220     {
00221         cf = cf_open_with_classpath(name, &classpath->boot);
00222     } else {
00223         for (size_t i = 0; i < classpath->entries; i++) {
00224             cf = cf_open_with_classpath(name, &classpath->user[i]);
00225 
00226             if (cf != NULL) {
00227                 break;
00228             }
00229         }
00230     }
00231 
00232     if (cf == NULL) {
00233         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Cannot find class %s\n", name);
00234     }
00235 
00236     return cf;
00237 } // cf_open()
00238 
00243 void cf_close(class_file_t *cf)
00244 {
00245 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00246     if (cf->jar) {
00247         zzip_file_close(cf->file.compressed);
00248     } else {
00249 #endif
00250         fclose(cf->file.plain);
00251 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00252     }
00253 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00254 
00255     gc_free(cf);
00256 } // class_file_close()
00257 
00263 uint8_t cf_load_u1(class_file_t *cf)
00264 {
00265     uint8_t data;
00266     size_t res;
00267 
00268 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00269     if (cf->jar) {
00270         res = zzip_file_read(cf->file.compressed, &data, 1);
00271     } else {
00272 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00273         res = fread(&data, 1, 1, cf->file.plain);
00274 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00275     }
00276 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00277 
00278     if (res != 1) {
00279         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00280                 "Unable to read from a class file");
00281     }
00282 
00283     return data;
00284 } // cf_load_u1()
00285 
00291 uint16_t cf_load_u2(class_file_t *cf)
00292 {
00293     uint8_t data[2];
00294     size_t res;
00295 
00296 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00297     if (cf->jar) {
00298         res = zzip_file_read(cf->file.compressed, data, 2);
00299     } else {
00300 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00301         res = fread(data, 1, 2, cf->file.plain);
00302 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00303     }
00304 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00305 
00306     if (res != 2) {
00307         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00308                 "Unable to read from a class file");
00309     }
00310 
00311     return (data[0] << 8) | data[1];
00312 } // cf_load_u2()
00313 
00319 uint32_t cf_load_u4(class_file_t *cf)
00320 {
00321     uint8_t data[4];
00322     size_t res;
00323 
00324 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00325     if (cf->jar) {
00326         res = zzip_file_read(cf->file.compressed, data, 4);
00327     } else {
00328 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00329         res = fread(data, 1, 4, cf->file.plain);
00330 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00331     }
00332 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00333 
00334     if (res != 4) {
00335         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00336                 "Unable to read from a class file");
00337     }
00338 
00339     return (data[0] << 24) | (data[1] << 16) | (data[2] << 8) | data[3];
00340 } // cf_load_u4()
00341 
00350 void cf_seek(class_file_t *cf, long offset, int whence)
00351 {
00352     long res;
00353 
00354 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00355     if (cf->jar) {
00356         res = zzip_seek(cf->file.compressed, offset, whence);
00357     } else {
00358 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00359         res = fseek(cf->file.plain, offset, whence);
00360 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00361     }
00362 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00363 
00364     if (res < 0) {
00365         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00366                 "Unable seek in a class file");
00367     }
00368 } // cf_seek()
00369 
00374 long cf_tell(class_file_t *cf)
00375 {
00376     long pos;
00377 
00378 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00379     if (cf->jar) {
00380         pos = zzip_tell(cf->file.compressed);
00381     } else {
00382 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00383         pos = ftell(cf->file.plain);
00384 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00385     }
00386 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00387 
00388     if (pos < 0) {
00389         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00390                 "Unable to get the current offset in a class file");
00391     }
00392 
00393     return pos;
00394 } // cf_tell()
00395 
00396 #if JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
00397 
00403 ZZIP_FILE *jar_get_resource(const char *resource)
00404 {
00405     ZZIP_FILE *zzip_file = NULL;
00406 
00407     for (size_t i = 0; i < classpath->entries; i++) {
00408         if (classpath->user[i].jar != NULL) {
00409             zzip_file = zzip_file_open(classpath->user[i].jar, resource, 0);
00410 
00411             if (zzip_file != NULL) {
00412                 break;
00413             }
00414         }
00415     }
00416 
00417     return zzip_file;
00418 } // jar_get_resource()
00419 
00420 #endif // JEL_JARFILE_SUPPORT
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:44 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
